reasoning: The 2025 National Heads-Up Poker Championship was pre-recorded in August 2025. In October 2025, betting activity on Polymarket strongly suggested that the results had leaked, with Sam Soverel surging to a 99% probability of winning. As a result, the market price for Marius Gierse plummeted to around 2%. Given that the tournament has already been completed and credible leaks point overwhelmingly to a different winner, the probability of Marius Gierse winning is effectively negligible. Since 0.02 is the lower bound constraint for predictions, I am estimating a 2% chance.
